examples: I'll tell 'ee what' tis, Durbeyfield, 'said she exultingly;' he'll never have the heart not to love her.
'I'll tell' ee what 'tis, Durbeyfield,' said she exultingly; 'he'll never have the heart not to love her.
The Miss Reeds could not play as well! Said she exultingly. I always said you would surpass them in learning: and can you draw?
